zh.Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾阿爾德布恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Goddard於1393年出生在英國維爾爾波爾頓時，他的父親John Goddard of Poulton24歲，母親Cecily Mildenhall21歲。他於大約1414年與Jone Wheatley在英國英格蘭維爾爾馬爾波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1460年在英國維爾爾馬爾波洛享年67歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Goddard于1393年出生在英国維爾爾波爾頓时，他的父亲John Goddard of Poulton24岁，母亲Cecily Mildenhall21岁。他于大约1414年与Jone Wheatley在英国英格兰維爾爾馬爾波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1460年在英国維爾爾馬爾波洛享年67岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Goddard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Godhard, a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements gōd ‘good’ or god, got ‘god’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The name was popular in Europe during the Middle Ages as a result of the fame of Saint Gotthard, an 11th-century bishop of Hildesheim who founded a hospice on the pass from Switzerland to Italy that bears his name. This surname is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.
English: perhaps occasionally a variant of the occupational name   Gothard  . The two surnames may have been much confused.
French: variant of   Godard  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Gothard
meanings: English: occupational name for a keeper of goats, from Middle English gotherde (Old English gāt ‘goat’ + hierde) ‘herdsman, keeper’.

English: variant of Goater, with excrescent -d, either a topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or ditch, from Middle English gote ‘watercourse’ + the agent suffix -(e)r, or an occupational name either from Middle English gotherde ‘goatherd’ or from Middle English goter ‘goatherd’, an agent derivative of Middle English got(e) ‘goat’ (Old English gāt).

variants.name: Godard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Reynald, Alcide, Armand, Aurel, Celine, Cyprien, Dominique, Emile, Etienne, Euclide, Gilles.
French: from the personal name Godard, of ancient Germanic origin (see Goddard ).

English (of Norman origin): variant of   Goddard  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Goertz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Christoph, Erwin, Guenter, Juergen, Kurt, Otto.
German (also Görtz): patronymic from the personal name Goert, a short form of Godhard (see Goddard ), Gottfried or Gerhardt , common in Rhineland.
Germanized form (also Görtz) of Sorbian Gerc; see Gertz .

variants.name: Goodart
meanings: Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Gothard  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Goddard was born in 1393, in Poulton, Wiltshire, England, his father, John Goddard of Poulton, was 24 and his mother, Cecily Mildenhall, was 21. He married Jone Wheatley about 1414, in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1460, in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Goddard est né en 1393, à Poulton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John Goddard of Poulton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Cecily Mildenhall, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Jone Wheatley environ 1414, à Marlborough, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1460, à Marlborough, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Goddard 1393 in Poulton, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Goddard of Poulton 24 und seine Mutter Cecily Mildenhall 21. Er hat um 1414 in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Jone Wheatley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1460 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Goddard è nato il nel 1393 nel Poulton, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, John Goddard of Poulton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Mildenhall, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Jone Wheatley circa 1414, nel Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1460, nel Marlborough, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Goddardが1393年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアポウルトンで生まれた時，父John Goddard of Poultonは24歳，母Cecily Mildenhallは21歳であった。約1414年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルルボロウでJone Wheatleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1460年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルルボロウで67歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Goddard(이)가 1393년 영국 윌츠히르 파우턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Goddard of Poulton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Mildenhall(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 말를버루그h에서 Jone Wheatley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1460년 영국 윌츠히르 말를버루그h에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Goddard nasceu em 1393, em Poulton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Goddard of Poulton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Mildenhall, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Jone Wheatley aproximadamente 1414, em Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1460, em Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Goddard родился в 1393 г. в местности поултон, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Goddard of Poulton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily Mildenhall, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Jone Wheatley около 1414 г. в местности марлбороую, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1460 г. в местности марлбороую, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Goddard nació en 1393, en Poulton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Goddard of Poulton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Cecily Mildenhall, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jone Wheatley aproximadamente 1414, en Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1460, en Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
